chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-507 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.8872/2024. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.8873/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2024 None has appeared on behalf of applicant nor any intimation received. In the interest of justice by granting urgency application the matter is taken-up for hearing. The bail granting impugned order dated 05.08.2024 is perused. It appears that injuries received by injured Dost Muhammad and Ghulam Qadir were shown bailable while the injuries No.1 & 2 sustained by complainant were too bailable however only his injury No.1 was declared “Ghayr-Jaifah Munaqqillah” by medico-legal officer and it was on non-vital part of his body. The impugned order further reflects that despite accused were armed with firearm weapons but they did not use the same. The offence for which the respondents / accused were allegedly involved are not punishable for death or life or even for ten years and therefore does not fall within the prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C. The grounds assigned in the impugned order were justified, as such, no infirmity or illegality is found therein and the same does not require interference of this Court therefore instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
